star_2.text: First play was great, gameplay is unique and smooth (recommend play offline), level up heroes also great, downside is after finished the task of every character we cannot play them after you need to wait, and you cannot save your progress, and after many plays and enter this game lastly you can't open this game its stop working and I can't play this anymore whis looks disappoints me, 2 stars

I'm very unhappy that's why I'm giving the game 2 stars. First of all it is an awesome game but it lags all the time and making me not to enjoy the game second of all the load of about 2-3 minutes is very annoying.. Why will a running game load for about 3 minutes. Its a very fun and interesting game with a great concept but fix the lagging and long load screen and i can see myself spending all my money on this...

The problems: going to underground is rooftop is underpleasing (too many unpredictable obstacles); finishing and landing from the drone can kill you (compared to Subway Surfers, where you always land safely); the latest version resets the Ms if continuing your run after restarting the game; too little content with every update (same characters and skins); the talents tab is close to useless; the season lasts 20 days (season = 3 months, google it). I like that there are no intrusive ads, like SS.

Great overall, like this nex gen endless runner, but i don't see an option linking to my google play account. So if i change devices will my progress be reset? Solve this issue ill up my rating to max. Update: Sad to know that progress cannot be saved in cloud or transferred to a new device(source official faq).
My progress from previous sessions constantly doesn't save when I log back in and I have to keep doing it over and over. Something definitely needs fixed with this.

star_3.text: All around fun game, the locations and obstacles are unique, ads aren't too prominent, and the power-ups are fun to use and add a bit of depth to the game. The energy system really kills it for me though, there's been too many times where I'd open up the game only to see that I'll need to wait 20 minutes for a single energy just so I can play the game once. (Hot take) If it had unlimited runs this game could honestly be a better Subway Surfers

Great gameplay but the amount of greedy systems is staggering. Energy, season pass, 1% upgrades for every room, upgrades for each of the things in these rooms, character upgrades, expeditions, chests, bot building... Wow. Also, there needs to be a resolution slider for lower end phones, cause this game is HEAVY on my old snapdragon 625. 30 fps mode also doesn't seem to have any smoothing or Vsync.

New game, still a lot needs to be changed/upgraded...the POV is kind of bad.... really hard to see whats behind an obstacle....some obstacle is really hard to dodge as it comes out of nowhere or not clearly visible.....The game graphics and character and environment design is really good....hope the developers make the POV kind of like subway surfer

Nice game like subway surfers upgrade or scientific style but this game take too much time in my even I played heavy games on my phone but their open quite fast but it's not and another thing is it's charge time, okay I know you don't want that anyone don't get addiction on it but still time could 10 to 15 minutes Is fine.

i love this game! so many things to collect! but i don't like that you need energy to run and the way we only got 10 of that and we needed to wait for 25 minutes? that sucks. this game would be better than subway surfers if we had unlimited energy or just maybe remove it.

This game is so good the graphics and music of this game is so refreshing like the game completely but this game should be a free play game spending energy and wait to refill not good enough, 3 stars because of energy bar system developers should do something about it.

Metro land is a very nice and wonderful game,with nice graphics and mode 🥰,but😞the problem is that when ever I upgrade any player I use to play to save more chips when it's gets fulledi can't open it ,I would like you guys to check your games and update some states in it please 🙏🙏

I really like this game but the game not registering your inputs really let's it down. Nothing is more infuriating when you're doing everything right just for a swipe up not to register and you lose a really good run.
An okay endless runner, personally I feel the main menu is overcomplicated, it feels like there's an never ending pile of meaningless rewards stuffed in random menus.
Game is great ...I would love to see wall run and it would be cool if you developers add some animation on jumping objects.... really a great game

What is happening to the view. The screen seems to zoom in and all the main menu icons sit on top of each other. Played yesterday with no issues and then today its like this. A fun game but annoying menus.
The progress is not saved in any account, after watching an ad the game's music and sound stops. please fix these issues

team, the lag is no more.Ki dly add some new maps. a theme based maps to add more fun to the game. add new challenges plz. same old map down and up ... same old throwing ball to the screen .... do something or should I just uninstall it 🧐

I loved the game in the beginning but when I changed to a new phone I had to start all over again from the beginning and now the game lagged a lot and shut off and then I have to start the same game over again when I just passed that level.
Good game but please can there be more characters and its to hard to colect chips and outfit tokens without buying them.
This game was perfect until I wasnt even able to start it anymore.. I don't know what the Issue is..
It's a nice game to play.There reason why I gave it three stars is that the graphics are a bit nicer than subway surfers.
That game is awesome but the graphic kinda bad pls add shadow and make the animation smooth and realistic.Another idea add parkour it will change the game
Like Subway, but feels more pay to win. Like the graphics, don't like the energy system.
I don't like that the cloth token gift are too small so I'll have to wait a long time before getting enough token to by cloth

star_4.text: Metroland is a visually attractive endless runner with smooth controls, bright futuristic cities, and catchy music that creates a fun first impression. The gameplay is easy to learn and relaxing for short sessions, making it enjoyable for casual players. However, its online working weakens the experience. Please make it offline. Also Google play option is not there. Please, available Google Play Games process save options. Also make it optimized. FPS drops on this game is seriously sad.

Wow, this game is absolutely amazing. The graphics is just of high quality,the characters are so vivid as matter of fact this game will be my second favourite after Subway surfers, since they are of the company Kiloo. Well, there is a problem I encountered while playing on. There are some silly moving cameras in areas like; the garden & the museum please can remove them they really getting on my nerves. Another problem I have is that the more multiplier i have the more speed increases.

Picking up collectables blocks my view. At higher speeds these pop ups get in the way and make it more difficult to see the obstacles and avoid them. Also quests are annoying. They're too long to read. I've gotten very close to running into obstacles whilst reading them. Suggestion. If need run left side show tiny trail in the middle to show that i need to run on this side. I would instantly know without needing to read what i need to do. Tell me what the quest is without making me read it.

Your game data does not move with you to a new device, forcing you to start over. I think the reward output for some of the clothing effects should be increased. The quest rewards don't seem affected. What is 50% of 1? The value of the bag was worth 20, now 30. Doesn't seem worth the effort. Also, please include a way to keep track of all tokens. Maybe give the ability to cash in useless tokens for something else?

I didn't expect to fall in love with it but I did. It's almost better than subway surfers. Generally it's a little repetitive but it's still fun. Controls are great as well as the graphics. Love that you don't have to spend real money to progress through the game. Love the characters, upgrades and outfits. Love the quests also. Just wish there was a little more to to the game, would love to see more levels and quests, maybe even special events. Looking forward to future updates!

I've had this game for a year now and I still can't access the piggy bank, which fills with coins as you progress with the missions and story. Perhaps it would work if I tapped on it with Internet connection. Apart from that...and the difficulty of the rooftops, LOL, you will love this game!

Well I played it, ( I don't play it anymore) but it was so fun and so cool I uninstalled it because I wanted new characters that will be cooler And it's even more fun if every update you need to get tokens for to the final you get a new character of the update but it has limit like subway surfers

Game is awesome.......!!! It is better than subway surfers. But i rated 4 star because of the energy bar in the game. It take long time to get 1 bar. So i request the developers to reduce the time and also the game need a bit optimization for lower device.....🤗

My experience was amazing but the game takes a lot of time to load unlike every other game I know that takes less than 30 seconds to load this one takes up to 2 minutes to do so thereby making the player uninterested or pissed off I would really appreciate it if you fix this problem I will also come back and give the remaining one star if and only if it is fixed because overall the game is fun with nice graphics.

I am loving this game so much. I don't know if it is actually playable offline. The multiplier is something that I still an understanding about. Recently when I played the game, I saw a glitch and it somewhat disturbs my gameplay.

The game is amazing, graphics, events characters. The only reason why I'm giving it 4 stars is the random glitches and crashes especially after playing any event. If that is fixed then this game is a 5 star

Good game nice hd graphics and enjoyable game play... But is one main problem is that it cannot save progress with any account.. Developers should do must work it on for the saving progress data with the link accounts facebook or Google..

The gameplay is good, but I wan more depth, so that the rollings and jumps can be much more effective, also this is an absolute copy of subwaysurfer, so dont bother downloading if u dont want a worse experience.

Fun. It's like subway surfers but futuristic and more functions like your hideout and leveling up your characters. There is a bug whenever you finish a run though it plays the counting points sound every single second

Ok this game is good but after the last update it has so much ads which happens with every run, also it could use a few more skins and even a few new runners. I still play but I am losing interest because the fun is been taking away by ads.

Gameplay is nice but the only problem is that power unlocked when your score increase.if you have a constant score than you are not able to enjoy other powers and jump shoe are worst they doesn't work

Please give an option to login with Google play games login in India. I can't able to see or run any login function in game. Fear is, if I remove the game from phone storage, it'll erase all of my saved data in game so far I've saved in until today. Pretty please... 😢🙇🏻🙏🏻

I think it's good but only one thing that the energy is too let to get, serious you need 1 hour to get a single energy 😐 it,s too bad some of players want not stop action but in the game we only get 10 chances in a hour 😑
Great graphics, challenging, but fun. Need to sort that landing from a drone glitch out, when it throws you into a completely different lane as you land.

All in all this game was awesome but I rly want the developers to add more gadgets possibly cutscenes add more characters new animations new skins new events hoverboard then I'll rate the app 5 instead of 4 and will forward it to my friends

star_5.text: Best running game ever thank you so much ! I've rated you 5 as you deserve it. But what's up with this game...all off a sudden i fall through the floor in about every run ?? Another problem is that sometimes if you got the speed juice and you run to catch the magnet ect it doesn't pick it up. I've rebooted my tablet a few times but it doesn't help. I have uncapped wifi. Please fix glitches as it's driving me insane. Stay safe and healthy everyone. Greetings from South Africa.

5***** plus. Seriously good. Had a recent blip where the game wouldn't load...thought I'd lost my progress (grrrr). Turns out it was a big update...so how good is this game?...Been compared to Subway surfers not even close!. This is simply brilliant, better graphics, better music, better in every way. It's not often I spend money in a game well this changes that it's that good. Get ready for fast gameplay. Eye to swipe gameplay...this is the game to rule all running games. Nuff said!!!.

This game is soooo AWESOME, it's pretty great really,the graphics is great,the characters are awesome everything is nice,but I have a few suggestions to add to the game.you guys could add the option to change the characters outfits.also the energy whatever is pretty annoying but it's cool too those are all I have in mind for now,also I'm looking forward to the next update 😊.

I love this. So futuristic. I really like the way the characters lvl up and also the rewards method. One thing i dont really like is that i can only play 10 times and have to wait 5 min to recharge. No restriction to play the game please. And pleaseee let me sync this game to google play and facebook. I dont want to lose progress if i change phone or if in the future i uninstall and decided to play again. Please let me sync the progress.

I just really like the game. The graphics and overall gameplay is on point. It's a nice upgrade to subway surf. Though the concept of both games are similar, you feel like you are playing two dissimilar and unrelated games even if you have both on your mobile device....which I do.

I love the variety of this genuine Classic. I hope you haven't taken out the part of the variety that you get to use the Hammer on that was a Plus in this OFFLINE Masterpiece. That's what Drew me to it was that it Can Be Played Offline as well. And the Variety & Gameplay & the Fact that it's so much Fun Playing. I always Enjoy Good 3D Graphics as Well as Endless Runner Games! Huge Thank you to the Developer & to Google Play for making it all Possible. Nice Work Y'all! RECOMMENDED to All Gamer's!

This game is completely awesome. IF you're searching for Endless Running Game then Nothing can be better than Metroland. The graphics are so cool. But we want new characters and new world tours. Also you should limit the amount of tokens for Characters. And biggest problem is Cloud save because if we accidentally uninstall the game we would loose the whole progress. I really want you to make in game id with password for cloud save also Facility for transport of Progress from Android to IOS too

The game is great, definitely a 5-star BUT since the season pass ended the game keeps crashing randomly, especially after doing an event run. Needs an update. Also there is a glitch that needs fixing, sometimes when you jump and roll down you clip through the map and end up dying. The new update fixed everything it seems.

I heard about this game from a Youtuber call PocketGamer. And it's just like Subway surfer but with a little more challenges. The graphics is better than Subway Surfer. I still love subway surfer, but Metroland is better. I hope it will get many more characters just like Subway Surfer in the future, and add even more challenges. The developers did a good job with Metroland. (One of the characters reminds me of a character from Knockout City 🤔)

This game is nice! Oh no! Not nice!, Brilliant Kiloo this game is really brilliant Graphics are always great in your games Music is also great Your sound designers are cool They made a great music And guys please download this game because it has so many obstacles And when a game has so many obstacles it would be great And this the best runner game in runner games! Great Job Kiloo! 😃

Nostalgic yet fresh! Brings back Subway Surfer memories from back in the days when phones had 1GB ram. This game is a well deserved fresh look in the genre and hope it doesn't get crowded with lots of in-app purchase icons and too many types of currencies like Subway Surfer has unfortunately transformed to now.

Well Overall this game is amazing.The Graphic looks Perfect and Colors are shining and HD. But There is One thing that want to discuss about. The energy point to start level takes 1 hour for each point to receive and that's kind of bothering player who wants to play this game more than 10 times.So please decrease the time of achieving energy points which are needed to start the game then it is good to go.Plus Thanks for creating this Great game.I personally love it.

This game is so nice and great but the problem is the magnet 🧲 and the double coins and other items they use to finished early when playing the game, the magnet 🧲 and double coins and others items when using it or when running if you have them during the game time before 20 or 25 seconds it finished early, example am having a game talking tom gold run if you have a magnet before it finished it takes a period or a couple of minutes before it finished, please your next updating solve the problem
enjoying the game running at a great level and I am so proud to have been able to play

Nice graphics and gameplay although can be glitchy at times, if you like these type of games then definitely download, yes you pick up coins and bonuses, yes you move from left to right, isn't that the premis for most games. Nice game ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Love your Game🔥💯🎯 Developers it's Offline, 🆓 and So much fun to play ▶️ very Addictive Game play it has so many👍🏆 missions and side missions there's variety and that's why it's better than other runner games! This game is awesome. Super colorful, epic loot and power-ups. Just wish there was way more than five playable characters. Not just have more costumes for the current characters.
I really like this game, I was looking for something similar to subway surfers and it's surpassed expectations. However the last few days the game keeps lagging and glitching.

This is perfect, the only issue is I can't open it offline which is pretty disappointing because in previous updates it was possible. I hope the devs look after the issue and keep up the good work. Thankyou
